MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patrick Heard. Plaintiff was represented by Arnold W. Evje, Esq. and Defendant, William Campbell appeared in pro per. The case settled per written stipulation of parties and not placed on the record. Trial date is vacaed.
